title: Tab Pending List not working as intended
description:
Tab Pending List is not filtering as intended for all of the paper/coating combination tabs at the top.

Show if:
Status = **Pending** (shows but no time stamp) or **Received Artwork**

**ALL** tab should show all offset jobs fulfilling status requirement above.

The various paper+coating/Roll/Flatbed/Hardware tabs should show only those items.

Currently, doesn't seem like any of the tabs have any real logic behind the filtering.

title: UPS API shipping rates not populating consistently
description:
Shipping rates are not populating consistently. Last friday 9/5 it was working at times. Today, I can not get it to work at all.

EDIT: ***MIGRATED ACCOUNTS SEEM TO BE MISSING THE "ATTENTION" FIELD WHICH MAY BE THE REASON WHY UPS RATES ARE NOT POPULATING AT CHECKOUT.***
